ModMetaData.name: Casualties: Rimknown - Sound Cannon
ModMetaData.author: Creeperslayers6
ModMetaData.description:
Standalone mod which recreates the Sound Cannon from Casualties: Unknown in Rimworld.
Features: - A base lore-accurate Sound Cannon turret and a more advanced version. - New Internal Bleeding Hediff and Hemothorax Hediff. - Rare (Optional) Storyteller event which lands a Mechanoid-owned base Sound Cannon somewhere on the map as a gift :D.
Mod Compat: - Should support custom VEF races with custom Blood textures such as Erin's Experiments.
